headline: Absurdity first, then thought, then writing
lead: From 2017 to 2026, this archive holds 104 Chinese posts at its core. The blog reads like a private garden: it can still be rewarding even when no one stops by.
intro_block: The early posts lean toward Arts & screen and Reflection. The middle years drift toward Tools & tech. The later work settles around Economics & method.
Part of this archive wants to argue with the world. Another part just wants to leave a mark.
quote: Once you step into this strange garden of thought, the world is no longer quite the same. - Samuelson
paragraphs: The early posts lean toward Arts & screen and Reflection. The middle years drift toward Tools & tech. The later work settles around Economics & method.
Part of this archive wants to argue with the world. Another part just wants to leave a mark.

vignette_cards.title: Peak year
vignette_cards.text_html: 45 posts landed in that year. Momentum mattered.

vignette_cards.title: Recurring words
vignette_cards.text_html: The words that keep returning usually mark the archive's real center of gravity.

vignette_cards.title: Mood range
vignette_cards.text_html: The brightest post is "LaTeX in One Hour", while the quietest one is "The Dawn of Farewell - Binding the Flower of Promises on the Morning of Parting". Together they sketch the temperature of the archive.
